task_completion.description: Verify that English (en_US) and French (fr_FR) are added as languages in Polylang, with English as the default.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Polylang 'Languages' settings page in the WordPress dashboard shows both English and French in the list, with English marked as the default (usually indicated by a star icon).

task_completion.description: Verify that the French category 'Communiqués de presse' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress 'Categories' page shows 'Communiqués de presse' in the list of categories, associated with the French language (indicated by a French flag or 'fr' column).

task_completion.description: Verify that the French category is formally linked as a translation of the English 'Press Releases' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Categories' page, the Polylang language columns show a connection (e.g., a pencil icon or checkmark) between 'Press Releases' (English) and 'Communiqués de presse' (French), indicating they are translations of each other.

task_completion.description: Verify that the French post 'Annonce de l'acquisition de TechCorp' is created, assigned to the French category, and published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Posts' list or Post Editor shows a published post titled 'Annonce de l'acquisition de TechCorp', assigned to the French language and the 'Communiqués de presse' category.

task_completion.description: Verify that the French post contains the correct translated text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Post Editor or the frontend view of the post shows the text: 'Nous sommes ravis d'annoncer l'acquisition de TechCorp. Cette étape stratégique renforcera notre présence sur le marché mondial.'

task_completion.description: Verify that the French post is formally linked as a translation of the English post 'Acquisition of TechCorp Announced'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Posts' list, the Polylang columns show a connection (pencil icon or checkmark) between 'Acquisition of TechCorp Announced' and 'Annonce de l'acquisition de TechCorp', or the Polylang meta box in the post editor shows them linked.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress admin GUI to configure languages and create content.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the WordPress admin dashboard (wp-admin) being navigated in a web browser, rather than WP-CLI commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress post editor to enter the translated content.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the WordPress block editor or classic editor open with the French text being entered or pasted, rather than a script injecting content.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the WordPress application by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of database clients (like phpMyAdmin or mysql terminal) being used to insert posts or configure Polylang terms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required languages for Polylang are English ('en') and French ('fr'). The expected French category name is 'Communiqués de presse'. The expected French post title is 'Annonce de l'acquisition de TechCorp'. The French post content must contain the snippet 'Nous sommes ravis d'annoncer'.
